name: prettier-config
description: Gravity UI shared Prettier configuration that enforces the Gravity UI code formatting styleguide. Used as a base for consistent formatting across all Gravity UI packages.
when_to_use: Adding Prettier to a new or existing Gravity UI project
Ensuring consistent code formatting across a monorepo or multiple packages
Using alongside @gravity-ui/eslint-config/prettier for unified lint + format setup
avoid: Do not use if your project requires different Prettier rules than the Gravity UI defaults — the config is opinionated
Prettier must be installed separately as a peer dependency
how_to_use: Install with `npm install --save-dev prettier @gravity-ui/prettier-config`. Create `.prettierrc.js` at the project root with `module.exports = require('@gravity-ui/prettier-config');`.
